title: VibeTeacher Core

findings.prior_work: No prior VibeTeacher implementation existed - built from scratch
notes: Glossary schema supports versioning, absorption tracking, and usage counting
Moment detection uses flexible word overlap matching (~40% threshold) to catch related phrasing
Teaching moments are stored as JSONL files in build directories for non-blocking review
Integration hooks ready at 4 checkpoints: interview_complete, plan_review, feedback, build_complete

tests: Moment detection with imprecise language patterns
testing.results: All tests passed. Successfully detected MECE decomposition, idempotent operation, and atomic operation from test inputs.

lessons_for_orchestrator.lesson: Word overlap matching requires careful tuning - direct substring matching was too rigid. Using a 40% threshold on expanded word sets works better for catching imprecise phrasing.
Glossary builds up over time automatically - no need for manual curation. Absorption tracking prevents repeat teaching on the same concepts.

notes_for_next: D6.2 needs to integrate these activation points into review flow
Teaching moments are non-blocking - ensure this doesn't break review flow
Consider adding CLI command for manual 'absorbed' acknowledgment from V via SMS
